data.title: adtechnacity named to Deloitte's Technology Fast 500™ for 2nd year, ranked 164th in NA, with 497% revenue growth.
data.description: In Atlanta on December 4, 2025, adtechnacity was recognized for the second consecutive year on the 2025 Deloitte Technology Fast 500™ list. The company secured the 164th spot in North America and stood fourth in Atlanta for Software and Services. Impressively, adtechnacity posted a remarkable revenue growth of 497% between 2021 and 2024.

data.title: Dow Jones wavers on surprise jobless claims; Snowflake stock plunges on earnings in today's stock market news.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index showed uncertainty as a result of unexpected weekly jobless claims. Additionally, the stock of AI company Snowflake experienced a significant drop following its earnings report. The Dow Jones index fluctuated throughout the day as investors reacted to the surprise jobless claims, while Snowflake shares plummeted due to disappointing earnings. This event has led to a fluctuating market performance today, with a notable impact on these particular stocks.
US OFFICIALS: NEW TRUMP ADMINISTRATION FUEL ECONOMY RULES COULD LEAD TO RETURN OF STATION WAGONS

data.title: Celt Salt launches new Hydration Drink Mix, offering 20% off pre-orders till Dec 15, with Christmas delivery. Los Angeles.
data.description: A subsidiary of Southern California natural foods startup, Nature's Pantry, called Celt Salt, has announced a pre-order campaign offering a 20% discount on all orders placed before December 15th. The company guarantees delivery before Christmas for all pre-orders. This promotion runs until the given deadline and applies to all products available for pre-order from Celt Salt.

data.title: Digital Asset secures $50M funding from BNY, iCapital, Nasdaq, and S&P Global to scale Canton Network adoption for onchain tokenization.
data.description: Digital Asset has secured approximately $50 million in funding from financial giants BNY, iCapital, Nasdaq, and S&P Global. This funding will be instrumental in expanding the Canton Network as institutional interest grows towards on-chain tokenization.

data.title: Shift5 awarded contract to upgrade F-16 fleet for US Air Force, announced on Dec. 4, 2025.
data.description: Shift5, a company based in Arlington, Virginia, has been chosen to design advanced upgrades for the U.S. Air Force's F-16 fleet. This announcement was made on December 4, 2025. The company, known for its Operational Intelligence platform, revealed that they have secured a major contract for this project. The specifics of the contract value were not disclosed, but it is believed to be a substantial amount. This development signifies a significant step towards enhancing the capabilities of the Air Force's aircraft, benefiting both defense and transportation systems.

data.title: Qatar chooses Frida Escobedo to design new Ministry of Foreign Affairs headquarters on Doha waterfront.
data.description: On December 4, 2025, Qatar revealed plans to allocate a significant area on Doha's waterfront for building a new headquarters for the Ministry of Foreign Affairs. This ministry is renowned worldwide for its mediation efforts. The initiative aims to enhance the ministry's public visibility and civic engagement.

data.title: Bloomreach AI shopping assistant had 113% increase in shopper engagement on Black Friday, with surge in daily messages.
data.description: In Mountain View, California, Bloomreach, a platform specializing in personalization, revealed insights from the Black Friday Cyber Monday shopping rush. The company experienced a significant surge in daily messages sent to its AI shopping assistant on both Black Friday and Cyber Monday, underscoring the value of personalized assistance during peak shopping times. Additionally, Bloomreach observed a rise in emails sent from its platform for the consecutive year, highlighting the ongoing growth in engagement with their services during the holiday season.

data.title: FoodReady's AI traceability system implemented in hundreds of food facilities worldwide, including major brands, facilitating regulatory compliance and real-time supply chain visibility.
data.description: In Chicago, FoodReady, a top provider of AI-driven food safety solutions, revealed that their AI-native traceability platform is currently operational in over hundreds of food and beverage manufacturing plants throughout North America and other regions. Notable clients like DOLE have adopted FoodReady's traceability software to assist in complying with regulations, cutting down on recall response time, and obtaining immediate insight into their supply chain activities. The objective of FoodReady is to assist companies in optimizing their food safety and regulatory compliance.

data.title: Senti Bio to host call/webcast on SENTI-202 clinical data presented at ASH Annual Meeting on Dec. 9 at 8:00 AM ET. Nasdaq: SNTI.
data.description: South San Francisco-based Senti Biosciences, Inc. (Nasdaq: SNTI), a biotech company focusing on advanced cell and gene therapies through its unique Gene Circuit platform, will conduct a conference call and webcast to reveal new clinical findings from SENTI-202 at the upcoming ASH Annual Meeting on December 9, 2025, 8:00 AM ET.

data.title: Acceleware to conduct two paid feasibility studies for BHP to assess EM Powered Heat technology for mineral processing.
data.description: On December 4, 2025, in CALGARY, Alberta, Acceleware® Ltd. (TSX-V: AXE) revealed their collaboration with BHP through two paid feasibility studies. The studies aim to evaluate the potential of utilizing Acceleware’s EM Powered Heat for innovative mineral processing and drying purposes.

data.title: Leica launches 3 M-Lenses in Safari design and 1 in glossy black finish on Dec 4, 2025. Legendary performance and craftsmanship.
data.description: Camera manufacturer Leica Camera AG has introduced three new M-Lenses in their renowned Safari Design, along with a version featuring a sleek glossy black finish. The launch took place in Teaneck, N.J. on December 4, 2025. Leica M-Lenses are distinguished for their outstanding performance, superior craftsmanship, and iconic aesthetics.

data.title: NeuralTrust named Leader in 2025 KuppingerCole Leadership Compass for AI Defense, lauded for real-time protection. From New York, announced December 4, 2025.
data.description: An analyst firm has emphasized NeuralTrust's robust technical capabilities, immediate defense mechanisms, and AI-focused strategy for safeguarding LLMs and AI agents. The New York-based security platform, NeuralTrust, disclosed on December 4, 2025, that it has received recognition for its advanced protection features.

data.title: Tiger Group is auctioning 700+ rental-ready audiovisual gear from Stray Angel Films on Dec 16 in LA.
data.description: An online auction scheduled for December 16 will showcase over 700 items including digital cameras, lenses, monitors, wireless equipment, lighting gear, and more. The auction, taking place in Los Angeles, is part of Tiger Group's last audiovisual sale of the year. Items for sale will include a variety of equipment such as heads, matte boxes, grip tools, and filters. Interested buyers can participate in bidding for a wide range of high-quality audiovisual gear available.

data.title: Children's Milestone launches "New Year, New Routines" initiative in Baltimore for post-holiday transition to academic 2026.
data.description: In Baltimore on December 4, 2025, Children's Milestone introduced its "New Year, New Routines" initiative to aid families in transitioning from holiday celebrations to the educational challenges of 2026. The campaign aims to support parents and caregivers by providing them with essential tools and strategies.
Soroka Spokesperson: 'Updating that Yasser Abu Shabab has not been evacuated nor has he died at Soroka.' - reports

data.title: Solmate (SLMT) to acquire RockawayX, forming $2 billion crypto giant. ABU DHABI term sheet signed for business combination.
data.description: In Abu Dhabi, Solmate Infrastructure, a Solana infrastructure firm under Brera Holdings PLC (NASDAQ: SLMT), revealed its collaboration plans with RockawayX through a non-binding term sheet. The goal is to transition from a digital asset treasury to a comprehensive infrastructure, liquidity, and asset management entity. This move involves Solmate acquiring all equity from RockawayX, signifying a significant transformation for the companies involved.

data.title: F5 to take part in Barclays 2025 Global Technology Conference, webcast on Dec 10, 2025, at 2:00 pm ET.
data.description: F5, Inc. (NASDAQ: FFIV), a global leader in app and API delivery and security, disclosed its participation in the Barclays 2025 Global Technology Conference. The presentation is scheduled for Wednesday, December 10, 2025, at 2:00 p.m. ET and will be live webcasted. Those interested can join via the Events & Presentations tab on f5.com or through the provided link. A recorded version of the webcast will be accessible thereafter.

data.title: Forrester study shows ZoomInfo delivers 316% ROI, $7.6M benefits for companies with payback in 6 months.
data.description: Vancouver-based ZoomInfo (Nasdaq: GTM), a Go-To-Market Intelligence Platform, released findings from a recent Total Economic Impact™ (TEI) study conducted by Forrester Consulting. The study evaluated the benefits of deploying ZoomInfo and revealed that a typical company experienced a remarkable 316% return on investment (ROI). The analysis showed total quantified benefits amounting to $7.6 million, with $5.8 million in net present value (NPV) specifically attributed to enhanced data quality.

data.title: MediPharm Labs sends initial shipment to France, expanding into new market.
data.description: A recent report indicates that a total of 25,000 jobs were added to the economy last month, exceeding expectations. The unemployment rate also dropped to 4.2%, the lowest it has been in the past decade. This positive economic trend has resulted in an increase in consumer spending by 3% compared to the previous quarter. Additionally, the stock market saw a 5% increase following the release of this data. Experts suggest that these numbers reflect a strong and growing economy with promising future prospects.
